method: impeccable dual-agent critique — Assessment A (design/UX) + Assessment B (technical/a11y)

heuristics.name: Visibility of system status
heuristics.notes: Nav badge live count, owned state shows edition number, checkout confirmation copy. No async ops so no loading states needed.

heuristics.name: Match between system and real world
heuristics.notes: Warm vocabulary (edition, stall, Vitrine, 'Send it back'). 'Vitrine' requires about-page for unfamiliar users — minor.

heuristics.name: User control and freedom
heuristics.notes: Return flow with 'Keep it' escape, FirstPurchaseNotice 'Not now', 404 CTA. Checkout-to-return is one extra step — acceptable.

heuristics.name: Consistency and standards
heuristics.notes: Identical nav and footer nonclaim on all 8 pages. CTA style, accent color, Nunito font consistent throughout.

heuristics.name: Error prevention
heuristics.notes: FirstPurchaseNotice before first add prevents misunderstanding of synthetic nature. Return step prevents accidental removal.

heuristics.name: Recognition rather than recall
heuristics.notes: Nav badge shows count, edition detail shows full provenance, checkout confirms identity. Nothing to remember between screens.

heuristics.name: Flexibility and efficiency of use
heuristics.notes: Single well-executed happy path. No search/filter (6 editions — not needed). Acceptable scope.

heuristics.name: Aesthetic and minimalist design
heuristics.notes: Keepsake system clean, warm, uncluttered. No competing visual noise.

heuristics.name: Help recognize and recover from errors
heuristics.notes: 404 friendly with CTA. Return flow reversible. Maker form demo-only — no real validation needed.

heuristics.name: Help and documentation
heuristics.notes: About page explains concept. FirstPurchaseNotice is inline contextual help. Maker page clarifies demo context.

heuristics.name: System status (ARIA announcements)
heuristics.notes: ARIA landmarks present: banner, main, contentinfo, nav aria-label='Main'/'Footer'. FirstPurchaseNotice has aria-label. No async ops needing live regions.

heuristics.name: Semantic HTML
heuristics.notes: h1 on every page. Buttons for actions, links for navigation. role='img' aria-label on EditionArtwork shape. img alt on uploaded images.

heuristics.name: Keyboard / focus accessibility
heuristics.notes: Native button/link elements fully keyboard accessible. FirstPurchaseNotice uses native button for dismiss (no JS focus trap, but not a modal overlay).

heuristics.name: Code quality / consistency
heuristics.notes: TypeScript strict 0 errors. validate-contracts PASS (0 warnings, 9 checks). Next.js 15 async params pattern correct.

heuristics.name: Security / chainless contracts
heuristics.notes: No wallet/chain/crypto code in any source file. No forbidden deps in package.json. localStorage only, zero RPC calls.

heuristics.name: Code readability
heuristics.notes: Components well-named and scoped. Lifecycle proof chain complete. No dead code.

heuristics.name: Performance
heuristics.notes: Next.js App Router static rendering. Minimal client JS. Only next/react/react-dom in prod. No heavy libraries.

heuristics.name: Code minimalism
heuristics.notes: Only 3 prod deps. No unnecessary abstractions. Shortest working implementation.

heuristics.name: Error handling
heuristics.notes: not-found.tsx handles unknown routes. ReturnPanel handles edition-not-found gracefully. Maker form is demo-only.

heuristics.name: Documentation
heuristics.notes: Code is self-documenting via naming. Lifecycle proof artifacts complete (intent/research/selection/plan/engineering eval results).

p1.description: text-muted at 3.94:1 contrast fails WCAG AA for normal text (needs 4.5:1)
p1.affected: EditionCard artist/count (12.5px bold), footer nav links (13px extrabold), body secondary copy
p1.fix: Darkened --ks-muted from oklch(55% 0.015 60) → rgb(139,119,109) to oklch(53% 0.015 60) → rgb(115,106,99)

ac3_verdict.evidence: Combined score 8.5/10 ≥ gate 7.0/10; P0 count 0; P1 found and fixed before seal
